title: claytonia adsurgens
intro: Claytonia adsurgens, also known as spring purslane or miner's lettuce, is a perennial herb native to the western United States and Canada. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Claytonia adsurgens are attributed to its high content of vitamins A, C, and E, as well as minerals like calcium, iron, and potassium, which contribute to its health benefits, including improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function. Claytonia adsurgens can be prepared as a tea, salve, or tincture, and is often consumed fresh in salads or used as a cooking green.
